title: Fresh Peruvian Mussel Stew
description: A bright, citrusy stew featuring fresh mussels, cilantro, and a dash of lime, slow-cooked to silky perfection. Low-sodium and perfect for a solo dinner.

ingredients.name: Fresh mussels
ingredients.notes: scrub and bleach, discard any broken shells

instructions: Rinse mussels under cold water, scrub shells, discard any that are cracked or open before cooking.
Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion, sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and diced bell pepper; cook 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add diced tomato and cook, stirring, until tomatoes soften, 4 minutes.
Pour in low-sodium vegetable broth and citrus juice; bring to a gentle simmer.
Return cleaned mussels to the pot; cover and cook for 5 minutes, or until mussels open, discarding any that remain closed.
Stir in chopped cilantro, season with freshly ground black pepper, adjust seasoning as needed.
Remove from heat, let stew rest 2 minutes for flavors to meld.
Ladle into bowls, garnish with extra cilantro if desired, serve immediately.
